transcript: All week long, we've been scaring a bunch of our guests. Yesterday, Taylor Swift was here on the show, and I love doing this. We sent her to a fake dressing room where I was hiding. We put some hidden cameras, and told her to go look at something in the bathroom, a picture of the two of us, and I scared her. Thank you. Oh. Aw. Oh, my God, that was the best one yet.
